result.summary: Found 4 issues including truncated navigation items, clipped game cards, and a partially visible banner arrow.

issues.description: The horizontal navigation tab bar clips the last visible item 'Hot Gam...' mid-word, and additional tabs beyond are not visible or indicated clearly.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll indicator (e.g., fade gradient + arrow) or ensure tab labels are not truncated to indicate scrollability.

issues.description: Game cards in the 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections are cut off on the right edge, with game titles partially hidden (e.g., 'MAGNI PHO...', 'MUNC MI...', 'HYPERC...', 'DAR WATE...').
issues.suggestion: Add a visible overflow fade or carousel arrow to signal horizontal scrollability, and ensure partial cards are clearly styled to indicate more content.

issues.description: The left arrow/chevron on the promotional banner is barely visible against the dark blue background, making it hard to notice as a clickable navigation control.
issues.suggestion: Increase the contrast or size of carousel navigation arrows, or add a semi-transparent background behind them.

issues.description: The bottom game row in 'Top Played New Games' appears cut off vertically, suggesting the page is mid-scroll or content is not fully rendered in the viewport.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the last visible row of game tiles is not clipped at the bottom to avoid giving the impression of broken layout.
